title: Privacy Policy
content:
PRIVACY POLICY

Effective Date: 01 January 2026


This Privacy Policy ("Policy") is issued by Quick Spicy ("Company", "Quick Spicy", "we", "our", or "us") and forms an integral part of the Terms and Conditions governing the use of the Quick Spicy Platform. This Policy describes how the Company collects, receives, stores, processes, uses, discloses, transfers, and protects the personal information and other data provided by users while accessing or using the Quick Spicy mobile application, website, WhatsApp services, customer support, or any other platform authorized by the Company.


By accessing or using the Quick Spicy Platform, registering an account, placing an order, or otherwise providing personal information to the Company, the User expressly acknowledges that they have read, understood, and voluntarily consented to the collection, processing, storage, disclosure, and use of their personal information in accordance with this Privacy Policy and the applicable laws of the Republic of India.


Quick Spicy is committed to maintaining the confidentiality, integrity, and security of all personal information collected through its Platform and shall take reasonable technical and organizational measures to safeguard such information against unauthorized access, disclosure, alteration, misuse, loss, or destruction. While the Company adopts commercially reasonable security practices, no method of electronic transmission or storage can be guaranteed to be completely secure. Accordingly, the Company shall not be liable for any unauthorized access or disclosure resulting from circumstances beyond its reasonable control.


This Privacy Policy shall be governed by and interpreted in accordance with the applicable laws of the Republic of India, including the provisions of the Digital Personal Data Protection Act, 2023, the Information Technology Act, 2000, and other applicable laws, rules, and regulations relating to data protection and privacy. In the event of any inconsistency between this Policy and any mandatory provision of applicable law, the applicable law shall prevail to the extent of such inconsistency.
